title: Email value not extracted for HubSpot contact creation
symptom: When attempting to create or update a contact in HubSpot, the email value is not filled in, resulting in a status of [undefined].
applies_when: Using HubSpot node to create/update contacts
Email value is expected from a previous node
not_this_if: Email value is correctly populated in the previous node output
root_cause: The issue arises when the Merge node is configured incorrectly. Using the Append operation instead of Combine by position can lead to mismatched data, resulting in undefined values being passed to the HubSpot node.
fix_steps: Change the operation from Append to Combine by position
Test the workflow again to ensure the email value is populated
agent_instruction: Change the Merge node operation to Combine by position and save the workflow.
